# Widget Platform 2.0 Launch

We are going to revolutionize the widget industry with this game-changing platform. Our cutting-edge approach will unlock new paradigms.

The fact that we built this in 6 weeks is a testament to the team. I personally led the architecture, and my decisions paid off.

## What's new

The platform empowers users to create widgets faster. We leverage synergy between the new API and the existing dashboard.
